source.query:
select status__c ,
customer_name__c ,
project_id__c ,
description__c ,
city__c FROM sfbatch1__c

logMessage.value:
@concat(
    'copied data from pt_landing to deltabronze',
     string(activity('Copy data1').output.rowsRead),
     ' : ',
     string(activity('Copy data1').output.rowsCopied))

select * from pt.dev_metadata_schema.tbl_parameters where job_id=101 order by source_file_path;

logMessage.value:
@concat(
    'copied data from ',
     activity('lookup_metadata_table').output.value[0].source_file_path,
     ' to ',
     activity('lookup_metadata_table').output.value[0].layer,'rows read : rows wrriten ',
     string(activity('Copy productsdata').output.rowsRead),
     ' : ',
     string(activity('Copy productsdata').output.rowsCopied))

@concat(
    'copied data from ',
     activity('lookup_metadata_table').output.value[1].source_file_path,
     ' to ',
     activity('lookup_metadata_table').output.value[1].layer,'rows read : rows wrriten ',
       string(activity('Copy tier_details_data').output.rowsRead),

      string(activity('Copy tier_details_data').output.rowsCopied))

oracleReaderQuery.value: @concat('select count(*) as count from spadfdb.integcosting where created_date >  TO_DATE(''',activity('lookup metadata').output.value[0].watermark_column,''',''MM/DD/YYYY HH:MI:SS AM'')')

@concat('SELECT 
  CAST(project_id AS NUMBER(18,0)) AS project_id,
  product_id,
  tier_id,
  currency,
  description,
  CAST(cost AS NUMBER(18,0)) AS cost,
  cast(created_date as timestamp) as created_date,
  cast(upd_date as timestamp) as upd_date from spadfdb.integcosting where created_date >  TO_DATE(''',activity('lookup metadata').output.value[0].watermark_column,''',''MM/DD/YYYY HH:MI:SS AM'')')

logMessage.value:
@concat(
    'copied data from oracle_integ to pt_landing',
     string(activity('Copy data').output.rowsRead),
     ' : ',
     string(activity('Copy data').output.rowsCopied))
